name: Country-Style Chicken Kiev
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Stir together all filling ingredients, including chopped green onion, minced garlic, salt, and cracked pepper.
3. Divide the filling into four equal portions.
4. Freeze the portions for at least 30 minutes.
5. Place each flattened chicken breast on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Spread 1/4 cup of melted butter over each chicken breast.
7. Roll up each chicken breast and secure with wooden picks.
8. In a separate pan, melt the remaining butter in the oven until it begins to brown slightly.
9. Combine the reserved chicken ingredients: crushed crackers, chopped parsley, salt, thyme leaves, and cracked pepper.
10. Dip the rolled chicken in the melted butter, then coat with the crumb mixture.
11. Place the coated chicken breasts in the preheated oven.
12. Bake for 55-65 minutes or until the chicken is fork-tender.
13. Remove the wooden picks before serving.
